<> to replace one url with another in a string in php you can use the str_replace function which is simple and effective for this purpose here is an example of how to do it ```php $string = 'New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

'; $old_url = 'http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1'; $new_url = 'http://yahoo.com/abc1'; $replaced_string = str_replace($old_url, $new_url, $string); echo $replaced_string; ``` this code will replace all occurrences of the old url with the new url in the given string a palindrome is a word phrase number or other sequence of characters that reads the same forward and backward ignoring spaces punctuation and capitalization an example is "madam" or "racecar"
